description: rustc 1.95 surfaces four more lints that CI denies with -D warnings: clippy::manual_checked_ops at progress.rs:37 and :55; clippy::unnecessary_sort_by at resolve.rs:39; clippy::map_unwrap_or at store.rs:193. Fix by converting the patterns to their suggested idiomatic forms.
title: clippy: fix remaining rustc 1.95 lints (progress, resolve, store)
